---
title: "Mergin Maps Admin Essentials"
subtitle: "Exercise: User management"
author: "Ryan Aherin"
date: "2024-03-05"
format:
  pdf: 
    toc: false
---


{{< pagebreak >}}


# User management

In this exercise, we will cover the basics of user management on the
[Mergin Maps Dashboard](https://app.merginmaps.com/). By the end of the 
exercise you will learn about:

  - [User roles and permissions](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/permissions/#member-roles-and-permissions)
  - [Inviting users to your workspace](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/project-advanced/#add-users-to-a-workspace)
  - [Inviting guests to specific projects](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/project-advanced/#add-users-to-a-project)
  - [Managing project permissions](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/permissions/#managing-member-roles-and-project-permissions)


If you need to refer to any of the information covered in this tutorial, follow the links above.
